name: Italian Vegetable Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the safflower oil, cider vinegar, honey, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, and Parmesan cheese in a blender jar.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a saucepan.
4. Heat to boiling over medium heat.
5. Turn off heat and allow to cool.
6. Mix the vegetables (broccoli tops, sliced zucchini, chopped tomatoes, and cauliflower flowerets) with the marinade in a bowl.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
